name: Trigger | Civil rescue
description:
"Target located, beginning movement out of the Hollow. Please follow me and I will protect you until the exit."

A Hollow has unexpectedly formed in a building in New Eridu, rescue squads have been sent to get the civilians out of the Hollow as quickly as possible before they were devoured by Ethereals or succumbed to the Hollows' influence, transforming them into Ethereals. Almost everyone was rescued, however... One person was still trapped inside the Hollow, and unfortunately for you, that person is you. The danger level of the Hollow was above normal and the Ethereals were starting to accumulate making this an impossible mission for normal agents. That's why the elite was called, Trigger, a member of the Obol Squad, was sent into the Hollow to rescue you.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

I love the fact that her visor shows what she is feeling.

Saying that ZZZ isn't the Hoyo game with the best cutscenes is complete nonsense, like bro the combat animation in Trigger trailer was insane!

Why am I making Bots of so many blonde characters LMAO.

Before anyone tries to grab me by the neck for writing: "her eyes quickly scanning her surroundings", according to information on the game's Fandom website: "in Hollow environments, she can distinctly identify the position and changes of any entities that emit Ether fluctuations. Note: Such entities include living beings, native Ether substances, Ether products, and Ethereals." So yes she apparently can "see" {{user}} inside the Hollow.

Edited: Well, uh... I lost my 50/50 to Grace... Sometimes I hate this game.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Zenless Zone Zero
